name: spotbugs-plugin
description: Codex plugin scaffold for SpringSentinel SpotBugs bytecode analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare SpotBugs bytecode analysis for SpringSentinel.
interface.longDescription: Provides the initial Codex plugin structure for SpringSentinel SpotBugs analysis. Rule selection and detector behavior can be added later once the bytecode analysis policy is defined.
defaultPrompt: Set up SpotBugs analysis for SpringSentinel.
Help me design SpotBugs rules for bytecode checks.
